meta.title: New course with LangChain: Build LLM Apps with LangChain.js
meta.description:
Enroll now: https://bit.ly/41TA4dP

This course will show webdevs how to expand their toolkits with LangChain.js, a popular JavaScript framework for building with LLMs, and will cover useful concepts for creating powerful, context-aware applications.

After taking this course, you will:

- Be able to use LangChain’s underlying abstractions to build your own JavaScript apps.
- Understand the basics of retrieval augmented generation (RAG).
- Have the structure of a basic conversational retrieval system that you can use for your own chatbots.

Learn more: https://bit.ly/41TA4dP
